{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230456049CAF9BB2E6302E3FC999"}"},"total":3},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7598707922915885849","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"请各位兄弟姐妹读完以后，留下你们宝贵的建议，飞扬定诚心接受，有则改之无则加勉。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769217704,"group_id":"7591339915296640062","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1855576220116451"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7591339915296640062","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"68"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":1,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7595524857707594521","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"动物界再世华佗，陈青山。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768473645,"group_id":"7591339915296640062","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"大风起兮云飞扬，威加海内兮归故乡。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzDZ3E+keholOzxlij/8bVVSHzXozgLEf/B2XxN0dGOj","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1855576220116451","user_name":"云飞扬3"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1855576220116451","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7591339915296640062","book_info":{"abstract":"【都市+御兽+多女+系统+爽文】
倒霉的陈青山，刚穿越过来就继承了一家落魄的动物园，外加五百万的巨额债务。
在被仇家逼到绝境，即将贱卖动物园之际，却成功觉醒了御兽系统。
而抽风的系统，却判定陈青山继承的是落魄的御兽宗门。
在系统的帮助下，陈青山将青山动物园，发展得风生水起。
精通兽语的他，号称“动物界再世华佗”，任何动物生病了都可医治。
并且凭着兽语精通，屡破奇案，抓捕人贩子，特级通缉犯，一二三等功拿到手软。
……
高冷总裁苏清雅：青山，娶我好吗？我愿意以整个苏氏集团做嫁妆！
妩媚御姐陆灵瑶：青山，只要你肯入赘我陆家，我给你一百亿！
清纯萌妹慕容芙：青山哥哥，你好厉害，我要给你生猴子！
……
陈青山：对不起，各位，现在我只想好好经营动物园！
